cta.note: Approved user stories can be added later. Until then, Predicta shows the exact feedback loop instead of fake praise.

en.intro: Predicta is going into family-and-friends testing with a clear promise: collect real feedback, fix visible rough edges, and only show testimonials after users approve them.

signals.detail: Every tester starts from a real Kundli and checks whether Predicta remembers the active chart.
signals.label: Chart continuity

signals.detail: Feedback asks whether the answer shows chart proof, timing, limits, and practical guidance.
signals.label: Answer quality

signals.detail: Regular, KP, and Nadi are reviewed as separate rooms, not mixed into one vague answer.
signals.label: Method clarity

testimonialWall.body: This area is reserved for real approved feedback from early users. Predicta should earn trust before quoting people publicly.

placeholders.quote: I understood what Predicta used from my chart.
The app did not scare me. It gave limits and next steps.
I could ask in my natural language and still get a useful answer.

testimonialWall.title: Real testimonials will be approval-based.

testerLoop.body: Each early tester is asked to break the app like a real user: ask messy questions, switch languages, try reports, compare charts, and report confusing moments.

steps.body: Create or load a Kundli, then test whether dashboard, chat, reports, KP, Nadi, and remedies use the same birth details.
steps.title: 1. Test continuity

steps.body: Ask about money, career, marriage, health caution, and timing. Check if Predicta gives proof and avoids fear.
steps.title: 2. Test real questions

steps.body: Share what felt confusing, clipped, too wordy, hard to understand, or not premium enough.
steps.title: 3. Tell us what broke trust

testerLoop.title: How early feedback becomes product improvement.

en.title: Trust should be earned in public, not claimed.

cta.note: Approved user stories बाद में जुड़ेंगी. तब तक Predicta fake praise नहीं दिखाएगी, बल्कि साफ feedback loop दिखाएगी.

hi.intro: Predicta family-and-friends testing में एक साफ वादा लेकर जा रही है: real feedback लेना, दिखाई देने वाली कमियां ठीक करना, और testimonials सिर्फ user approval के बाद दिखाना.

signals.detail: हर tester असली कुंडली से शुरू करता है और देखता है कि Predicta active chart याद रखती है या नहीं.
signals.label: चार्ट continuity

signals.detail: Feedback में देखा जाता है कि जवाब चार्ट प्रमाण, समय, limits और practical guidance दिखाता है या नहीं.
signals.label: जवाब quality

signals.detail: Regular, KP और Nadi को अलग rooms की तरह review किया जाता है, vague mixed answer की तरह नहीं.
signals.label: Method clarity

testimonialWall.body: यह जगह early users के real approved feedback के लिए रखी गई है. Public quote दिखाने से पहले Predicta को trust earn करना चाहिए.

placeholders.quote: मुझे समझ आया कि Predicta ने मेरे chart से क्या use किया.
placeholders.role: पहली बार कुंडली देखने वाले user

placeholders.quote: App ने डराया नहीं. उसने limits और next steps दिए.
मैं natural language में पूछ सका और फिर भी useful answer मिला.

testimonialWall.title: Real testimonials approval-based होंगे.

testerLoop.body: हर early tester से कहा जाता है कि app को real user की तरह आजमाए: messy questions पूछे, language switch करे, reports try करे, charts compare करे, और confusing moments report करे.

steps.body: कुंडली बनाएं या load करें, फिर देखें dashboard, chat, reports, KP, Nadi और remedies वही birth details use करते हैं या नहीं.
steps.title: 1. Continuity test करें

steps.body: Money, career, marriage, health caution और timing पर पूछें. देखें Predicta proof देती है और डर से बचती है या नहीं.
steps.title: 2. Real questions test करें

steps.body: जो confusing, clipped, बहुत लंबा, समझने में मुश्किल या less premium लगा, वह share करें.
steps.title: 3. Trust कहां टूटा बताएं

testerLoop.title: Early feedback product improvement कैसे बनता है.

hi.title: Trust public में कमाया जाना चाहिए, claim नहीं.

cta.note: Approved user stories પછી જોડાશે. ત્યાં સુધી Predicta fake praise નહીં બતાવે, પણ clear feedback loop બતાવશે.

gu.intro: Predicta family-and-friends testing માં સ્પષ્ટ વચન સાથે જાય છે: real feedback લેવું, દેખાતી ખામીઓ સુધારવી, અને testimonials user approval પછી જ બતાવવી.

signals.detail: દરેક tester સાચી કુંડળીથી શરૂ કરે છે અને તપાસે છે કે Predicta active chart યાદ રાખે છે કે નહીં.
signals.label: ચાર્ટ continuity

signals.detail: Feedback માં જોવામાં આવે છે કે જવાબ ચાર્ટ પુરાવો, સમય, limits અને practical guidance બતાવે છે કે નહીં.
signals.label: જવાબ quality

signals.detail: Regular, KP અને Nadi ને અલગ rooms તરીકે review કરવામાં આવે છે, vague mixed answer તરીકે નહીં.
signals.label: Method clarity

testimonialWall.body: આ જગ્યા early users ના real approved feedback માટે રાખવામાં આવી છે. Public quote બતાવતાં પહેલાં Predicta ને trust earn કરવો જોઈએ.

placeholders.quote: મને સમજાયું કે Predicta એ મારા chart માંથી શું use કર્યું.
App એ ડરાવ્યું નહીં. તેણે limits અને next steps આપ્યા.
હું natural language માં પૂછી શક્યો અને useful answer મળ્યો.

testimonialWall.title: Real testimonials approval-based રહેશે.

testerLoop.body: દરેક early tester ને કહેવામાં આવે છે કે app ને real user જેવી રીતે અજમાવે: messy questions પૂછે, language switch કરે, reports try કરે, charts compare કરે, અને confusing moments report કરે.

steps.body: કુંડળી બનાવો અથવા load કરો, પછી જુઓ dashboard, chat, reports, KP, Nadi અને remedies એ જ birth details use કરે છે કે નહીં.
steps.title: 1. Continuity test કરો

steps.body: Money, career, marriage, health caution અને timing પર પૂછો. જુઓ Predicta proof આપે છે અને ડરથી બચાવે છે કે નહીં.
steps.title: 2. Real questions test કરો

steps.body: જે confusing, clipped, બહુ લાંબું, સમજવામાં મુશ્કેલ અથવા less premium લાગ્યું હોય તે share કરો.
steps.title: 3. Trust ક્યાં તૂટ્યો કહો

testerLoop.title: Early feedback product improvement કેવી રીતે બને છે.

gu.title: Trust public માં કમાવવો જોઈએ, claim નહીં.
